Find Rasters Intersecting an AOI (Polygon or Points)

gaza_find_rasters_for_aoi.Rd

This function identifies raster files from a tile index that intersect with a given Area of Interest (AOI), which can be a polygon or a set of points. It returns a character vector of the full paths to the qualifying raster files.

Usage

gaza_find_rasters_for_aoi(aoi_path, tile_index_path, overlap_threshold = 0.5)

Arguments

aoi_path

A character string. The full path to the spatial file (e.g., GeoPackage, Shapefile) defining your Area of Interest.

tile_index_path

A character string. The full path to the master vector file (e.g., GeoPackage, Shapefile) containing the footprints of all rasters.

overlap_threshold

A numeric value between 0 and 1. If the AOI is a polygon, this specifies the minimum required overlap as a proportion of the AOI's total area. Defaults to 0.5. Ignored for point AOIs.

Value

A character vector of full paths to the raster files that meet the intersection criteria. Returns an empty character vector if no rasters are found.
